channel.title: 寂照
channel.description: 在尘世中修行，在修行中自在

item.title: Beyond Failure: Breaking the Chains of Ego ✨
item.description: The heaviest burden is not debt, but the inner acceptance of defeat. Life only truly ends when the aspiration for growth

item.title: 🌿 The Wisdom of Universal Non-Obstruction
item.description: Most people swing between "reality" and "illusion," either clinging to the physical world or falling into nihilism. True

item.title: 工作的痛苦，藏在对热爱的执着里
item.link: https://blog.3333444.xyz/posts/2026-03-26-工作的痛苦-藏在对热爱的执着里.html
item.description:
遍计所执之缘起
带孩子的烦恼。
耳根反闻之实修
尝试法门。
item.guid: https://blog.3333444.xyz/posts/2026-03-26-工作的痛苦-藏在对热爱的执着里.html
